headline: A Look At ConocoPhillips (COP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And LNG Growth Expectations
summary: ConocoPhillips overview and recent performance snapshot ConocoPhillips (COP) recently closed at US$121.76, with about a 2% decline over 1 day, a 5% gain over the past week, a 6% decline over the past month, and a 24% gain over the past 3 months.
